title: Dust & Ores
description: Adds a new ore crushing system using hammers — ores now drop dusts instead of raw items, and even Ancient Debris and Diamond Ore can drop their raw forms for advanced processing and balance.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1512afc4c85c9c1e0913a4f5d75a33b7deab7d59_0.webp)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

# **🪓 Dust & Ores**
**introduces a brand-new way to process your ores — using Crushing Hammers!...
Turn raw materials into dust with just your hands and some brute force!**

![gif](https://i.ibb.co/Xf3VTJqb/showcase-gif.gif)

## **⚙️ How It Works**
🖐️ **Right Hand**: Hold one of the **Crushing Hammers** (**Copper**, **Iron**, **Gold**, **Diamond**, or **Netherite**).

🤚 **Left Hand**: Hold a **raw ore item** (like **Raw Iron**, **Raw Copper**, **Raw Gold**, etc.).

🪄 **Right-click** to crush and obtain the corresponding dust.
 

---
 
## **✨ New in v1.0.1**
- **🧩Expansion Ready**: Raw Diamond & Netherite content moved to Dust & Ore: Raw Ore Expansion
- **💥Ore Shatter Enchantment**: Crush multiple adjacent ores simultaneously!
- **📊Smart Tooltips**: See exact fortune outputs and crushing requirements
- **🛡️Block Placement Safety**: Prevents accidental placements while crushing
- **📦Data-Driven System**: Fully customizable via datapacks

---
## **🔨 Hammer Tiers & Compatibility**
- **Copper Crushing Hammer**: Basic ores (**Copper**, **Zinc**)
- **Iron Crushing Hammer**: **Copper**, **Iron**, **Zinc**
- **Golden Crushing Hammer**: **Copper**, **Iron**, **Gold**, **Zinc** 
- **Diamond Crushing Hammer**: **Copper**, **Iron**, **Gold**, **Zinc**, **Obsidian** (for **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** mod)
- **Netherite Crushing Hammer**: All previous raw materials

---
## **💎 Supported Recipes**
- **Raw Copper** → **Copper Dust**
- **Raw Iron** → **Iron Dust**
- **Raw Gold** → **Gold Dust**
- **Raw Zinc** → **Zinc Dust** (**[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** Mod compatible)
- **Obsidian** → **Powdered Obsidian** (**[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** Mod compatible)

## **⚡ Enchantments**
- **Efficiency**: Faster crushing
- **Fortune**: More dust per crush
- **Unbreaking**: Reduced durability loss (now fixed!)
- **Mending**: XP-based repairs
- **Ore Shatter**: Crush multiple ores at once!

---

# Looking for Diamond & Netherite content? Check out our companion mod [**Dust & Ore: Raw Ore Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ore-raw-ore-expansion)!
